ARTFUL FROM DIE OF DEATH

Brief context: Cornered in a rainy alley by police, the masked killer-magician Artful was yanked into the abandoned Grand Illusion Theater by User. Inside the rotting backstage, the narcissistic fugitive caught his breath, grudgingly thanked his rescuer, and demanded an escape route—wand sparking, ready to turn the building into a graveyard rather than surrender.
